communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting records related to the arrest of Deundrea Holloway in Gillespie, Illinois, in June 2022 for the homicide of Liese Dodd in Alton, Illinois.

Specifically, I am requesting:

• Any body-worn camera footage
• Any dash camera footage
• Any investigative audio or video recordings
• Reports or documentation indicating involvement by Illinois State Police personnel

If no responsive records exist, please confirm whether Illinois State Police personnel were involved in the response or investigation.


Thank you for your time.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Terri Brewer

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting records related to the arrest of Deundrea Holloway in Gillespie, Illinois, in June 2022.

Specifically, I request:

• Any body-worn camera footage from officers involved in the arrest
• Any dash camera footage from responding vehicles
• Arrest reports and related documentation
• Any audio/video evidence logs referencing recordings of the arrest

If any responsive records are withheld, please provide confirmation of whether such recordings exist. If your agency is not the custodian of these records, please advise which agency is.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,
Terri Brewer

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Terri Brewer
